item.title: From zero to RCE on Prusa HT90
item.description: How an afternoon of poking a 3D printer firmware with a stick turned into full compromise.

item.title: Official CTF Team of the University of Padova
item.description: What started as a group of curious hackers is now the official Capture The Flag team of the University of Padova.

item.title: cornCTF 2025 Results
item.description: The results of cornCTF are in! Here are the top 3 teams

item.title: DefCamp Quals 2024 — Alternating
item.description: Recovering a hidden file from a RAR v5 archive by patching a service header into a file header.

item.title: DefCamp Quals 2024 — CTF Infrastructure Vulnerability
item.description: From a popped shell to full Kubernetes cluster compromise — exploiting GCP metadata, kubelet credentials, and CSR auto-approval to bypass RBAC.

item.title: OpenECSC 2024 Final Round — Slurm
item.description: Exploiting a race condition in database writes and a checksum oracle to brute-force a secret file character by character.

item.title: LA CTF 2024 — Jason Web Token
item.description: Abusing Python’s floating point arithmetic to forge JWT-like tokens — when float(‘inf’) meets type juggling.

item.title: Insomni'hack Teaser 2024 — Vaulty
item.description: Exploiting a format string vulnerability to leak the canary and libc, then ROP to shell via a buffer overflow in a password manager binary.

item.title: srdnlen 2023 — Free Real Estate
item.description: Re-entrancy attack on a Solidity smart contract — bypassing extcodesize checks and draining tokens from a fake ad service.
